summary: Completed testing of Student Funnel changes and new Inquiry Page. All features working correctly: 1) Student funnel skill selection is now a regular step with auto-advance, 2) Action step (See Course Details / Book Free Demo) appears as a step not popup, 3) Online mode correctly skips city selection and goes to schedule, 4) Offline mode shows city selection after selecting center/home, 5) Inquiry page at /inquiry shows all 5 type options (Student, School, Growth Partner, Teacher, Team), 6) Lead flow works: Contact Details -> Select Offering -> Additional Details -> Submit to CRM, 7) Query flow works: Type of Query -> Contact Details -> Query Details -> Submit to ticketing. Backend APIs /api/inquiry/lead and /api/inquiry/query both working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check API returns healthy status
Backend: POST /api/inquiry/lead - Student lead created successfully
Backend: POST /api/inquiry/lead - School lead created successfully
Backend: POST /api/inquiry/lead - Growth Partner lead created successfully
Backend: POST /api/inquiry/lead - Teacher lead created successfully
Backend: POST /api/inquiry/lead - Team lead created successfully

seed_data_creation: Created test leads and queries via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student funnel changes tested: skill selection is now Step 1 with auto-advance, action step (See Course Details/Book Free Demo) is Step 2 (not a popup), online mode skips city and goes to schedule, offline mode shows city selection after center/home selection. New Inquiry page at /inquiry tested: 5 type options (Student, School, Growth Partner, Teacher, Team), Lead flow (Contact -> Offering -> Details -> CRM), Query flow (Query Type -> Contact -> Details -> Ticketing). All backend APIs working. OTP verification uses test code 1111.

mocked_apis_list: OTP verification - uses 1111 as test OTP (not real SMS/WhatsApp)
